caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits before a black microphone in an indoor setting that appears to be a clothing store. His shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." In the background, framed photos line the wall, and a white mannequin wearing a white garment stands beside racks of clothing. A red and white logo reading "BOOGIE" is visible in the lower corners of the scene. Across the sequence, the man speaks, shifting his gaze and facial expressions. He begins by looking slightly to his right with a neutral expression, then shifts his head slightly as he continues talking, eventually turning his face more fully toward the right side of the frame by the end of the clip.
